strengths: 15+ years of diverse engineering experience across cloud, AI, and infrastructure
Proven AI-agent infrastructure and open-source platform development (GISCollective)
Strong technical leadership and knowledge-sharing via workshops and community projects
concerns: No explicit evidence of Master's/PhD in AI-related field
Limited documentation of direct AI product development or cloud AI platform ownership
German language proficiency is basic, potentially limiting customer-facing roles in Berlin
response.justification: Bogdan brings deep, hands-on engineering experience across AI-agent systems, cloud infrastructure, and open-source platform building, with strong leadership and technical communication skills. While he lacks a formal AI advanced degree and explicit large-scale AI product ownership, his practical contributions to AI tooling and distributed systems align closely with the role’s needs, making him a compelling candidate despite minor gaps.
